{{Quote|A Mon Calamari captain of the Rebel Army, named Vrinko. He's hiding in a well guarded building but is about to relocate, so this is our chance. He will probably send out his troops first, so you will have to take care of them until he has no choice but to try and make a break for it.|Captain Okto to an Imperial|<ref name="SWG:SK">{{GalaxiesNGE}}</ref>}}
'''Okto''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]] who lived during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was in charge of the Imperial bunker during the [[Battle of Restuss]], and directed troops to destroy [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] comm antennas and [[Death/Legends|kill]] the Rebel leader Captain [[Vrinko]].

==Behind the scenes==
Okto was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
